# HR Dashboard Requirements

## Target Audience
HR Leadership Team, Department Managers

## Key Questions
- What is our current headcount and how has it trended over the past 12 months?
- What is our monthly attrition rate by department?
- How many new hires do we have each month?
- What is our gender diversity ratio across departments?
- Which departments have the highest turnover?

## Pages Needed

### Page 1: Executive Summary
- KPI cards for: Total Headcount, Attrition Rate, New Hires This Month, Avg Tenure
- Headcount trend line chart (12 months)
- Department slicer

### Page 2: Attrition Analysis
- Attrition rate by department (bar chart)
- Leavers trend over time (line chart)
- Leavers detail table (name, department, end date)
- Department and date range slicers

### Page 3: Diversity & Demographics
- Gender ratio donut chart
- Gender ratio by department (stacked bar)
- Headcount by location (bar chart)
